title: Manga Series Plan
description: Per-series catalog plan. Drives format-aware production. v2 adds localized titles, master/flatten format split (per PR #631 — webtoon as master, B&W as flatten-export), and three-connector-lane targeting (unified CANVAS / LINE Manga Indies / Naver KR). Source-of-truth: artifacts/manga/MANGA_FULL_CATALOG_PLAN.md (PR #624). Format weights: artifacts/research/manga_vs_webtoon_decision_matrix_2026-04-25.yaml (PR #626). Connector lanes: artifacts/research/webtoon_master_reference_2026-04-25.md (PR #631).

series_plan_schema.description: 1.0.0 = original Phase 0 schema (PR #632). 2.0.0 = adds localized_titles, master_format, flatten_exports, connector_lane (PR #631 refinements).

brand_id.description: Must match a brand in config/manga/brand_lora_plans.yaml

default_locale.description: v2 — primary authoring locale. Defaults to `locale` if absent. Used by lettering pipeline to know which locale's text is canonical when localized variants are missing.

localized_titles.description: v2 — title in each market. Lets one layered source ship to multiple markets without re-rendering. Per PR #631 Decision 1: 50–99× cost reduction across 5 markets vs re-render-per-locale.

format.description: Production format declared in v1. In v2, this should equal master_format (kept for backward-compat).

master_format.description: v2 — the single layered source format. Per PR #631 Decision 4: webtoon is master; B&W is downstream flatten-export. Saves ~40% of page-manga production cost.

flatten_exports.description: v2 — additional formats this layered source is exported as via downstream flatten passes. Empty for webtoon-only series.

connector_lane.description: v2 — which WEBTOON connector this series uses (per PR #631: three connectors needed, not one). unified_canvas covers en/es/fr/id/th/zh-TW/de. line_manga_indies covers ja_JP. naver_webtoon_kr covers ko_KR. print_only = KDP/Bookwalker/Comic C'moA path. partner_required = Piccoma/Bilibili/Kakao (no self-pub path). v2.1 (Phase 2X.2 per CATALOG_RECONCILIATION_SPEC D-18 + D-19): gray_zone_with_disclosure = zh_CN platforms (Bilibili/Kuaikan/Tencent) with full AI-disclosure metadata; hold_pending_market_clearance = ko_KR rendered + held until Korea AI Act enforcement clarifies.

panel_layout_template.description: Path to layout template (vertical_scroll_webtoon.yaml | bw_page_rtl.yaml | color_page.yaml | self_help_illustrated.yaml)

items.description: Platform id from config/publishing/ai_policy_blockers.yaml. Validator confirms each is ALLOWED or ALLOWED_GREY status.

target_platforms.description: Where this series ships. Must be a subset of ALLOWED + ALLOWED_GREY platforms in ai_policy_blockers.yaml.

pending_partner_targets.description: v2 — PARTNER_ONLY platforms (Piccoma, Bilibili Comics, Kuaikan, Kakao Page) this series WOULD ship to once partnership lands. Not validated against ALLOWED list. Documents intent without unblocking.

title.description: Genre-led title in `locale`. v2: also store in localized_titles.<locale> for cross-market shipping.

genre.description: Marketing genre. NOT 'self-help' — wellness substrate goes in topic field, never as the genre wrapper.

style.description: Visual style tag from MANGA_FULL_CATALOG_PLAN (cozy_iyashikei, dark_psychological, power_progression, hyper_clean_cinematic, social_media_simulacra, webtoon_vertical_romance).

topic.description: Wellness topic substrate (anxiety, sleep_anxiety, burnout, etc.). Hidden from marketing, drives content.

manga_author.description: EI character author per MANGA_FULL_CATALOG_PLAN (Hana Tidecalm, Yuki Nighthollow, Brook Hearthlight, etc.)

main_character_image_path.description: Path to rendered portrait under assets/manga_catalog/, or null until rendered. v2: prefer R2 manifest reference via main_character_manifest.

main_character_manifest.description: v2 — path to R2 artifact manifest (artifacts/manifests/manga_portraits/<character_id>.yaml). Replaces main_character_image_path for cloud-native flow per Layer 2 (PR #635).

comp_titles.description: Real bestseller comp titles in same genre (e.g. 'Frieren', 'Vinland Saga'). Wellness book comps forbidden — those belong in Pearl Prime catalog.

ai_disclosure_required.description: Computed from target_platforms (true if any platform requires disclosure)
